complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.本节概述自动编程完成后从标记对齐、模板审查、手动补录的完整操作讲解。: This section walks through everything you do after Auto-Programming finishes — mark alignment, template review, and manual entry.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.标记 / 对齐 PCB 的完整说明（mark 点添加、AI 算法与模板匹配切换、: Full instructions for Mark / Align PCB — adding Mark Points, switching between the AI algorithm and Template Match, Unique Markers, and color-range binarization — live on the :doc:`mark_align_pcb` page.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.在编程页面（Teach）左侧标签栏切换至 **元件** 标签后，主视图即为模板编: On the Teach page, switch to the **Component** tab in the left tab strip; the main view becomes the Template Editor. The component list sits on the left, the canvas on the right.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.进入模板编辑器时，若产品存在不健康元件，系统会弹出警告提示：: When you enter the Template Editor and the product still has unhealthy components, the system pops a warning:
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.画布顶栏提供两个功能开关：: The canvas top bar offers two switches:
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**平移所有元件（Translate All Components）**：启用后: **Translate All Components**: when on, dragging any component on the canvas translates every component and feature in the product together — useful for a global position correction.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**显示抽色二值化（Show Color Range Binary Mask）*: **Show Color Range Binary Mask**: when on, overlays the binarized color-range mask on the currently-selected feature — helps tune color parameters.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.画布右侧为垂直排列的绘制工具栏。工具说明如下（括号内为快捷键）：: The vertical drawing toolbar sits on the right side of the canvas. The tools and their keyboard shortcuts (in parentheses):
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**选择（Select，快捷键 V）**：左键点击或框选画布上的特征/元件；左键: **Select (V)**: left-click or drag-select features and components on the canvas; left-drag on empty space selects multiple ungrouped inspection boxes; middle-drag pans; scroll wheel zooms. Right-click on a selected object opens the context menu.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**平移/缩放（Pan/Zoom，快捷键 H）**：按住任意鼠标键平移视图；滚轮: **Pan / Zoom (H)**: hold any mouse button to pan the view; scroll wheel zooms. Pure browsing — leaves the selection alone.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**添加本体检测（Add Body Feature，快捷键 1）**：绘制主体（: **Add Body Feature (1)**: draw a body (mounting) inspection box.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**添加焊锡检测（Add Solder Feature，快捷键 2）**：绘制焊: **Add Solder Feature (2)**: draw a solder-joint inspection box.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**添加IC引脚检测（Add Lead Feature，快捷键 3）**：绘制整: **Add Lead Feature (3)**: draw an IC-lead inspection box spanning one row of leads; right-click the result to copy / rotate it for the other sides.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**添加文本检测（Add Text Feature，快捷键 4）**：标注丝印、: **Add Text Feature (4)**: mark silkscreen text, characters, batch / date codes, and anything else that needs OCR.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**添加条形码检测（Add Barcode Feature，快捷键 5）**：绘: **Add Barcode Feature (5)**: draw a barcode inspection region for PCB serial-number traceability.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**添加DIP焊点特征（Add DIP Solder Feature）**：绘制: **Add DIP Solder Feature**: draw a DIP through-hole solder-joint inspection box.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**添加桥接检测（Add Bridge Feature）**：绘制焊桥（sold: **Add Bridge Feature**: draw a solder-bridge inspection region.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**焊盘沾胶检测（Red Glue on Pad Feature，快捷键 8）*: **Red Glue on Pad Feature (8)**: draw an inspection region for red glue on the solder pad.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**颜色检测（Color Inspection Feature，快捷键 9）**: **Color Inspection Feature (9)**: draw a general-purpose color-region inspection box.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.各检测工具的具体检测参数说明见 :ref:`检测工具参考` 中各工具页面。: Per-tool inspection parameters are documented on each tool's page under :ref:`检测工具参考`.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.当自动编程结果整体不理想（漏识别区域较多、检测框生成质量差）时，可点击页面上方的: When the Auto-Programming result is poor overall (many missed regions, low-quality inspection boxes), click **Redefine Inspection Region** at the top to re-box the effective inspection area on the PCB. This button triggers a full *redo Auto-Programming* flow:
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.删除现有的 **全部检测框**\\ （含 mark 点 / 独特标记）。: Removes **every existing inspection box** (including Mark Points and Unique Markers).
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.在新框选的区域上重新执行自动编程，生成新的检测框集合。: Re-runs Auto-Programming on the new region and produces a fresh set of inspection boxes.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.自动触发 **自动生成检测参数** 与 **评估全部** 步骤。: Automatically triggers the **Auto-generate Inspection Parameters** and **Evaluate All** steps.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**重新定义检测区域** 是破坏性操作：现有所有 mark 点、检测框与人工调整: **Redefine Inspection Region is destructive**: every existing Mark Point, inspection box, and manual adjustment is wiped. If you only need to add a few inspection boxes in a small area, draw them manually with the matching toolbar tool (Body / Solder / IC Lead, etc.) instead of clearing the entire board.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.关于画布快捷键，参考 :ref:`编程页面快捷键`。: For the full canvas keyboard reference, see :ref:`编程页面快捷键`.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.元件列表面板顶部提供三个分组选项卡：: Three grouping tabs sit at the top of the component-list panel:
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**元件（Component）**：以单个元件（位号/标识）为粒度显示列表，每行: **Component**: lists components at the per-designator level; one row per component. Default mode.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**料号（Part）**：按 ``part_no`` （料号）合并同类元件，显示: **Part**: groups by ``part_no``; each row shows the total component count under that PN and the aggregated status.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**封装（Package）**：按 ``package_no`` （封装型号）分: **Package**: groups by ``package_no``; convenient for batch-reviewing the inspection status of every component sharing a package.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.点击列表中的某一条目，画布会自动定位并高亮对应元件或特征。: Clicking a list entry pans and highlights the corresponding component or feature on the canvas.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.列表上方提供搜索栏，支持按位号（标识）、料号、封装号进行文字搜索。搜索栏还提供以: The search bar above the list supports text search by designator, part number, and package number, plus the following filter tags (multi-select):
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**健康（Healthy）/ 不健康（Unhealthy）**：按元件健康状态过: **Healthy / Unhealthy**: filter by component health (mutually exclusive).
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**复评通过（Reevaluation Pass）/ 复评失败（Reevalua: **Reevaluation Pass / Reevaluation Fail**: filter by the most recent training-set re-evaluation result (mutually exclusive).
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**仅坏板标记（Badmark only）/ 排除坏板标记（Exclude ba: **Badmark only / Exclude badmark**: filter by whether the component is a badmark (mutually exclusive).
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.其它可用过滤标签（如 **未分组特征** 等）出现在同一搜索栏下拉中。: Additional filter tags (such as **Ungrouped Features**) appear in the same search-bar drop-down.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.若已上传 CAD，元件名称会同时显示丝印/标识。列表每行显示该元件的检测状态（通: When CAD has been uploaded, the component name shows the silkscreen / designator alongside. Each row also displays the component's inspection status (passed / failed / untrained / health state).
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.模板编辑器画布有三类主要操作模式，通过右侧工具栏切换：: The Template Editor canvas has three primary modes, switched from the right-hand toolbar:
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**选择模式（Select，V）**：点击或框选对象；不可直接拖动调整大小/位置: **Select mode (V)**: click or drag-select objects; size and position cannot be changed by direct dragging — feature boxes are clickable but locked against motion. Use the right-click menu after selecting.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**变换模式（Pan/Zoom，H）**：纯视图平移/缩放，不影响任何对象选择。: **Pan / Zoom mode (H)**: view-only pan and zoom; leaves object selection alone.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**绘制模式**：选中任意绘制工具（本体/焊锡/IC引脚等）后，左键在空白区域拖: **Draw mode**: pick any drawing tool (Body / Solder / IC Lead / ...) and left-drag on empty space to draw a new inspection box; the box becomes editable as soon as you release. In Draw mode, existing objects can also be selected and dragged to adjust — the cursor changes to the resize handles when you hover them.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.在画布上右键点击选中的对象，会弹出上下文菜单，菜单项根据当前选中类型而不同：: Right-clicking a selected object opens the context menu. Its entries vary by what's selected:
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**复制元件（Copy Component）**：进入粘贴预览模式，可在指定位置: **Copy Component**: enters paste-preview mode so you can place a copy at a chosen position.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**取消分组特征（Ungroup Features）**：解散元件分组，将其下所: **Ungroup Features**: dissolve the component grouping and return its features to ungrouped state (only shown on the base sub-board (``array_index = 0``) or on components that aren't part of a panel).
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**删除元件（Remove Component）**：删除元件及其所有特征。: **Remove Component**: delete the component along with every feature under it.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**添加到私有库（Add to Private Library）/ 保存到私有库: **Add to Private Library / Save to Private Library**: save the component template into the private library for reuse on other products.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**标记为NG（Mark as NG）**、**取消NG标记（Unmark as: **Mark as NG / Unmark as NG**: batch-toggle the NG status of components in the selection (sub-array siblings included).
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**跳过检测（Skip inspection）（N）**、**清除跳过检测（Cl: **Skip inspection (N) / Clear skip inspection (N)**: batch-set or clear the skip-inspection flag (badmark components excluded). See *Skip inspection* in :ref:`元件配置` for details.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**选中已分组元件内的某个特征时：**: **On a feature inside a grouped component:**
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**应用参数到同类型（Apply Params to Same Type）**：: **Apply Params to Same Type**: copy this feature's inspection parameters to every feature of the same type in the product.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**旋转**：向右旋转90°、向左旋转90°、旋转180°（仅选中单个特征时显示: **Rotate**: 90° Right, 90° Left, 180° (only shown on a single-feature selection).
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**将选中的特征分组为新元件（Group selection as new co: **Group selection as new component**: opens the grouping dialog; fill in the designator and other info to create a new component.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**组合为坏板标记（Combine into badmark）**：在满足条件时: **Combine into badmark**: shown when eligible — the selected features must not span sub-board instances and must not belong to a shared-panel region. Also shown on a single ungrouped feature.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**粘贴元件（Paste Component）（N）**：若剪贴板中有已复制的元: **Paste Component (N)**: if a component is on the clipboard, paste it at the right-click location.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**组合为坏板标记** 功能仅对未分组特征生效。已属于某元件的特征需在 :ref: **Combine into badmark** only works on ungrouped features. Features already inside a component must be converted via the *Component Type* selector in the Component Info panel — see :ref:`元件配置`.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.整板检测（包含 / 排除区域、表面污染检测等）的完整说明请参见 :doc:`wh: The full reference for Whole Board Inspection — Include / Exclude Regions, Surface Contamination, and so on — lives on the :doc:`whole_board_inspection` page.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.检测设置（比例模式 / badmark 模式 / 子板判废逻辑）的完整说明见 :: The full reference for Inspection Settings — ratio mode, badmark mode, and sub-board verdict logic — is in the *Inspection Settings* section of :ref:`产品设置（Recipe）`.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.基础信息：确认，或者按需录入 标识（丝印）、封装、料号（PN）。: Basic info: confirm or fill in designator (silkscreen), package, and part number.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.全板预览：是否存在缺失、漂移、超大/超小框。: Full-board preview: scan for missing boxes, drifted boxes, oversized or undersized boxes.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.局部密集区：是否重叠、是否覆盖相邻器件。: Dense local areas: check for overlap or boxes that bleed onto neighbouring parts.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.不健康列表：低置信度 / CAD 未匹配 / 尺寸异常。: Unhealthy list: low confidence, unmatched CAD entries, anomalous sizes.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.正确但标为不健康：若位置无误可点击列表边上的 ``?`` 直接确认恢复为健康。: Correct but marked unhealthy: if the position is fine, click the ``?`` next to the row and confirm it back to healthy.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.CAD 中存在但未检测：若实板缺失则忽略；若实际存在则手动补录。: Present in CAD but not detected: if the physical board lacks the part, ignore it; if the part is actually there, add it manually.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.自动编程误检时：删除并重新手动补录。: Auto-Programming false positives: delete and re-add by hand.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.页面顶部工具栏提供 **确认所有不确定的元件为可信** 按钮。当自动编程完成后，: The top toolbar exposes a **Confirm all uncertain components as trusted** button. After Auto-Programming, some components may be flagged *uncertain* (orange or gray, meaning Auto-Programming wasn't confident in its classification). Confirming each one by hand is tedious; this button confirms every *uncertain* component on the list in one batch and keeps Auto-Programming's inspection boxes and properties intact.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.建议在使用前先按 **不确定** 状态筛选元件列表，快速浏览这些元件的检测框是否: Before clicking it, filter the component list by *uncertain* status and skim each component's inspection box; if any are obviously wrong, delete or fix them individually first so the batch confirm doesn't preserve the bad boxes.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.右侧工具栏包含：: The toolbar on the right contains:
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**选择工具（V）**：左键拖拽框选多项未分组的检测框，右键唤出菜单，可分组合并: **Select (V)**: left-drag to select multiple ungrouped inspection boxes; right-click opens the menu where you can group them into a component; middle-drag pans; scroll wheel zooms.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**拖拽工具（H）**：按住任意鼠标键平移视图；滚轮缩放；用于纯浏览不影响选择。: **Pan (H)**: hold any mouse button to pan the view; scroll wheel zooms. Pure browsing — leaves the selection alone.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**本体工具（1）**：绘制主体检测框（Mounting）。: **Body (1)**: draw a body / mounting inspection box.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**引脚工具（3）**：绘制整排的引脚检测框（IC Lead）；框选后可右键复制: **Lead (3)**: draw an IC-lead inspection box that spans one row; right-click to copy / rotate it for the other sides.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**文本工具（4）**：标注丝印、字符、批次 / 日期等需要 OCR 的区域。: **Text (4)**: mark silkscreen text, characters, batch / date codes, and anything else that needs OCR.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**条形码工具（5）**：绘制条形码检测区域，用于 PCB 序列号追溯。: **Barcode (5)**: draw a barcode inspection region for PCB serial-number traceability.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**DIP 焊点工具**：绘制 DIP 插件焊点检测区域。: **DIP Solder**: draw a DIP through-hole solder-joint inspection region.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**桥接工具**：绘制独立桥接（连锡）检测区域，可置于元件旁。: **Bridge**: draw a standalone solder-bridge inspection region — place it next to the component.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**焊盘沾胶工具（8）**：绘制焊盘沾红胶检测区域。: **Glue on Pad (8)**: draw an inspection region for red glue on the solder pad.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**颜色工具（9）**：绘制通用颜色区域检测框。: **Color (9)**: draw a general-purpose color-region inspection box.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.关于快捷键，参考 :ref:`编程页面快捷键`: Keyboard reference: see :ref:`编程页面快捷键`.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.选择\"本体工具\"框出元件主体区域（紧贴真实外廓，尽量减少空白）。: Pick the **Body** tool and box the component body (hug the actual outline; keep blank space to a minimum).
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.选择\"焊料工具\"分别框出左右（或多端）焊盘/焊点区域；: Pick the **Solder** tool and box each pad / solder-joint area (left, right, or all ends).
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.本体框贴合元件实际形状，避免包含过多空白区域；: Have the body box hug the actual component shape; avoid including too much blank space.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.焊料框应该紧贴焊料的爬锡区域；: Have the solder box hug the solder fillet area.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.手动编程电容、电阻示意: Manual programming — capacitor and resistor illustration
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.分组与属性： 使用\"选择工具\"框选主体与全部焊料框 → 右键 \"将选中的特: Grouping and properties: use the **Select** tool to drag-select the body box and every solder box → right-click → **Group selection as new component** to create a component, filling in:
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.选择\"本体工具\"框出芯片主体（紧贴封装外沿）。: Pick the **Body** tool and box the IC body (hug the package outline).
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.选择\"IC 引脚工具\"框出任意一侧整排引脚（覆盖焊盘 + 焊料 + 引脚末端: Pick the **IC Lead** tool and box one full row of leads — the box must cover the pad, the solder, and the lead tip.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.右键\"复制\"该引脚框，拖动至对侧或其它边；必要时使用右键旋转使其与该边引脚方: Right-click → **Copy** the lead box, drag the copy to the opposite side or another edge, and right-click rotate to align with that edge's lead direction.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.框贴合元件实际形状，避免包含过多空白区域；: Have the box hug the actual component shape; avoid including too much blank space.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.(2D) IC 引脚检测需要划分 3 个区域：焊盘、焊料、引脚末端；参见 :re: 2D IC-lead inspection splits the lead region into three zones — pad, solder, and lead tip. See :ref:`IC 引脚检测 2D v2（Lead 2D v2，基于颜色比例）` for how the zones are split.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.使用\"选择工具\"框选主体与全部焊料框 → 右键 \"将选中的特征分组为新元件: Use the **Select** tool to drag-select the body and every solder box → right-click → **Group selection as new component** and fill in:
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.SOP/TSSOP 封装的存储芯片或驱动芬片: SOP / TSSOP memory or driver IC
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.SOP/TSSOP 封装的存储芯片或驱动芯片: SOP / TSSOP memory or driver IC
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.与 QFP 类似：本体工具框主体 → IC 引脚工具框一侧引脚后复制到另一侧 →: Same as QFP: use the **Body** tool for the body, the **IC Lead** tool to box one side of leads then copy to the other, and group them into a component.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.编程好的元件可以添加至私有库，方便后续在其它产品中复用。: A programmed component can be added to the private library for reuse on other products.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.选择已编程好的元件，右键唤出菜单，点击\"添加到私有库\"。: Select a programmed component, right-click, and pick **Add to Private Library**.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.在弹出的对话框中填写元件的封装、料号，点击\"添加到私有库\"完成添加。: In the dialog that appears, fill in the package and part number, then click **Add to Private Library**.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.在\"私有库\"页面可以选择元件模板, 点击 ``使用此模板`` 来添加到视图，: On the **Private Library** page you can pick a template and click **Use this template** to add it to the view, or delete library entries.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.确认全部元件后点击 ``训练`` ，耗时 ~1 分钟；完成后点击 ``自动生成检: Once every component is confirmed, click **Train** — it takes about a minute. When training finishes, click **Auto-generate Inspection Parameters** to derive parameters from the dataset distribution across all components.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.点击下方的\"评估全部\"按钮，对所有元件进行评估，（绿=模型预测正确 / 红=: Click **Evaluate All** below to evaluate every component (green = model prediction matches; red = model prediction disagrees with the label).
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**训练成功后开始测试又显示需要训练**：再点一次 *训练* 按钮；检查列表中是: **Training succeeded but starting an inspection prompts for training again**: click **Train** once more; also check the list for empty components (components with no inspection algorithm assigned).
**First training takes a long time (around 10 minutes)**: on an i7-8th-gen IPC, the first training run normally takes about 2.5 minutes; subsequent runs are significantly faster. Wait for training to finish.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.**训练失败原因不明**：检查训练集中是否有反馈图片越界（被切掉一部分），删除该: **Training fails for no obvious reason**: check the training set for feedback images that fall outside the board (partially cropped) and delete them, then retrain. If the failure follows a power outage or unclean shutdown, the database may be corrupted — recreate the product and retrain.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.后续：不健康项可参考 :ref:`检测参数` 章节按需微调；修改或补录后重新训练: Next steps: tune any unhealthy items as described in :ref:`检测参数`; after edits or additions, re-train and re-evaluate to iterate.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.页面顶部工具栏提供 **导入 CAD** 按钮，等价于自动编程向导第 5 步的: The top toolbar exposes an **Import CAD** button — equivalent to the CAD-upload step (step 5) of the Auto-Programming wizard. Reimport CAD after the product is programmed to batch-update existing components with designator / part number / package / coordinates / rotation, without re-running Auto-Programming. CAD file format and field mapping are covered in :ref:`自动编程`.
complete_user_guide/features/manual_prog.模板编辑器右上角的 **元件模板（Component Template）** 面: The **Component Template** panel at the top-right of the Template Editor carries a **Component Alignment** switch. When on, every component using this template runs AI alignment at inspection time (auto-correcting position within the allowed shift range); when off, AI alignment is skipped and the component is positioned directly by golden-board coordinates. Keep it on for large or stably-mounted components; for alternative components or components that frequently skew, decide based on on-site results. See :ref:`元件配置`.
